name: Forest
description: Power drawn from ancient trees, vines, wildlife, and living groves.

name: Mountain
description: Power drawn from cliffs, stone peaks, endurance, and sacred highlands.

name: River
description: Power drawn from freshwater, currents, rain-fed streams, and healing waters.

name: Sea
description: Power drawn from oceans, tides, reefs, storms, and maritime mysteries.

name: Sky
description: Power drawn from wind, clouds, birds, lightning, and open horizons.

name: Sacred
description: Power drawn from blessing, ritual purity, vows, prayer, and sanctuaries.

name: Shadow
description: Power drawn from fear, night, secrets, curses, and hidden places.

name: Underworld
description: Power drawn from death, decay, bones, ancestral thresholds, and lost souls.

name: Fire
description: Power drawn from flame, volcanoes, heat, rage, and transformation.

name: Earth
description: Power drawn from soil, roots, minerals, clay, and buried memory.

name: Spirit
description: Power drawn from raw spiritual force, unseen realms, and dreamlike presence.

name: Trickster
description: Power drawn from misdirection, jokes, illusions, games, and reversed paths.

name: Beast
description: Power drawn from instinct, claws, fangs, wild motion, and animal strength.

name: Divine
description: Power drawn from celestial authority, ancient vows, and rare heavenly favor.

name: Corruption
description: Power drawn from broken balance, spiritual infection, obsession, and despair.

name: Moon
description: Power drawn from moonlight, tides, dreams, sleep, mystery, and hidden truths.

name: Sun
description: Power drawn from daylight, growth, warmth, truth, and purification.

name: Ancestor
description: Power drawn from memory, lineage, old names, inherited duty, and family spirits.

name: Storm
description: Power drawn from typhoons, thunder, monsoon winds, and sudden change.

name: Mist
description: Power drawn from fog, mountain haze, vanishing paths, and uncertain borders.

name: Blood
description: Power drawn from life force, hunger, sacrifice, wounds, and cursed appetite.

name: Dream
description: Power drawn from sleep, visions, omens, nightmares, and prophecy.

name: Metal
description: Power drawn from blades, bells, chains, coins, gongs, and forged relics.

name: Poison
description: Power drawn from venom, rot, bitter herbs, insects, and toxic curses.

name: Guardian
description: A protector that shields allies and controls enemy attention.

name: Tank
description: A durable frontliner built to absorb punishment.

name: Warrior
description: A balanced physical fighter with reliable damage.

name: Berserker
description: A reckless attacker that trades safety for power.

name: Ranger
description: A precise ranged fighter that uses positioning and accuracy.

name: Assassin
description: A fast striker focused on critical hits and finishing weakened foes.

name: Mage
description: A spiritual damage dealer using curses, elements, or celestial force.

name: Shaman
description: A ritual caster that uses spirits, wards, and nature rites.

name: Healer
description: A recovery specialist that restores allies and removes conditions.

name: Support
description: A utility role focused on buffs, protection, and team advantage.

name: Controller
description: A battlefield manipulator that applies disables, slows, and forced movement.

name: Summoner
description: A caller of spirits, echoes, familiars, or temporary guardians.

name: Trickster
description: A disruptive role based on evasion, confusion, traps, and misdirection.

name: Warden
description: A territorial defender that grows stronger inside its favored habitat.

name: Oracle
description: A rare support-mage that reads omens and alters probability.

name: Espiritu
description: Nature spirits and unseen beings tied to rivers, trees, wind, and sacred places.
gameplay_role: Maintain natural balance and guide worthy travelers.

name: Bantay
description: Guardians that protect places, relics, thresholds, forests, mountains, or communities.
gameplay_role: Defend territory and judge human intentions.

name: Hayop
description: Mythical beasts and spirit animals that embody instinct, omens, and wild power.
gameplay_role: Serve as wild companions, predators, messengers, and mounts.

name: Tao
description: Humans transformed by curse, ritual, hunger, grief, blessing, or forbidden knowledge.
gameplay_role: Represent human choices and moral consequences.

name: Kaluluwa
description: Ghosts, wandering souls, ancestral echoes, and remnants bound by memory.
gameplay_role: Preserve memory, haunt places, or seek resolution.

name: Diyos
description: Divine or near-divine entities of immense spiritual authority.
gameplay_role: Shape mythic events and rarely join ordinary parties.

name: Salinlahi
description: Lineage-bound beings tied to family duty, ancestral houses, or inherited vows.

name: Likha
description: Constructs, enchanted objects, living idols, and beings shaped by ritual craft.
gameplay_role: Guard shrines, relics, tools, and old agreements.

name: Wise
description: Thinks before acting and values old lessons.

name: Protective
description: Defends allies, territory, and vulnerable beings.

name: Territorial
description: Challenges intruders but may respect proper offerings.

name: Mischievous
description: Enjoys jokes, riddles, tricks, and confusing travelers.

name: Curious
description: Approaches unfamiliar people, objects, and rituals.

name: Proud
description: Values honor, respect, and recognition.

name: Patient
description: Waits, watches, and acts only when the moment is right.

name: Vengeful
description: Remembers offenses and responds harshly to disrespect.

name: Compassionate
description: Helps the weak and responds well to mercy.

name: Stoic
description: Rarely shows emotion and resists intimidation.

name: Playful
description: Treats conflict like a game unless seriously threatened.

name: Cunning
description: Uses traps, feints, and indirect plans.

name: Loyal
description: Bonds deeply once trust is earned.

name: Timid
description: Avoids conflict and prefers hiding or fleeing.

name: Aggressive
description: Attacks quickly when threatened.

name: Noble
description: Acts according to duty and personal code.

name: Melancholic
description: Carries sorrow, longing, or old grief.

name: Greedy
description: Desires offerings, treasure, food, or attention.

name: Judgmental
description: Tests the character of humans before cooperating.

name: Restless
description: Moves constantly and dislikes being confined.

name: Secretive
description: Conceals motives, names, and true forms.

name: Honorable
description: Accepts fair duels and honest apologies.

name: Maternal
description: Protects children, nests, young spirits, or villages.

name: Scholarly
description: Values knowledge, stories, and old records.

name: Haunting
description: Speaks through signs, echoes, dreams, and omens.

name: Devout
description: Responds strongly to vows, rituals, and sacred promises.

name: Chaotic
description: Acts unpredictably and disrupts stable plans.

name: Merciful
description: Prefers cleansing corruption over destroying enemies.

name: Suspicious
description: Requires proof before trusting humans.

name: Joyful
description: Brightens nearby allies and resists despair.

name: Somber
description: Carries dignity, silence, and awareness of death.

name: Feral
description: Driven by instinct more than speech.

name: Teacherly
description: Guides younger beings through tests and stories.

name: Wandering
description: Rarely stays in one place for long.

name: Ritualistic
description: Acts according to precise rites and taboos.

name: Bold
description: Takes risks and pushes forward.

name: Gentle
description: Uses power carefully to avoid unnecessary harm.

name: Grieving
description: Bound to loss and unfinished farewell.

name: Mocking
description: Taunts enemies to provoke mistakes.

name: Dutiful
description: Prioritizes assigned purpose above personal desire.

name: Aggressive Striker
description: Prioritizes direct damage and weakened targets.
behavior_rule: Attack first; use strongest available damage skill.

name: Defensive Guardian
description: Protects allies and uses guard skills often.

name: Supportive Healer
description: Keeps allies alive and removes negative effects.
behavior_rule: Heal low HP allies; cleanse dangerous statuses.

name: Debuff Controller
description: Weakens enemies through slow, fear, blind, and curse.

name: Ambush Predator
description: Waits for openings, then bursts down vulnerable targets.
behavior_rule: Hide, mark target, strike with high critical chance.

name: Pack Hunter
description: Coordinates attacks with allies of the same habitat.
behavior_rule: Focus fire and gain bonuses near allies.

name: Territory Warden
description: Becomes stronger while defending a marked zone.

name: Ritual Caster
description: Uses setup turns to power major effects.
behavior_rule: Build charge, then release strong magic.

name: Trickster Disruptor
description: Uses confusion, swapping, evasion, and random effects.

name: Summon Caller
description: Calls spirits, echoes, insects, or minions.

name: Boss Phase Shifter
description: Changes tactics when HP thresholds are crossed.
behavior_rule: Use phase scripts at 75%, 50%, and 25% HP.

name: Cowardly Evader
description: Avoids damage and may flee when low on HP.

name: Counter Fighter
description: Lets enemies attack first, then retaliates.

name: Berserk Finisher
description: Grows more dangerous at low HP.

name: Cleansing Spirit
description: Targets corrupted foes and protects sacred allies.

name: Weather Caller
description: Changes the battlefield weather to gain advantage.

name: Omen Reader
description: Alters luck, crits, accuracy, and turn priority.

name: Poison Harrier
description: Applies poison and survives while damage over time works.

name: Life Drainer
description: Damages enemies while restoring itself.
behavior_rule: Use drain skills when below 70% HP.

name: Shield Breaker
description: Targets tanks and removes barriers.

name: Field Manipulator
description: Creates terrain hazards and forced movement.

name: Ally Buffer
description: Increases team attack, speed, defense, or faith.

name: Duelist
description: Focuses on one enemy and avoids area attacks.

name: Relic Protector
description: Prioritizes defending objectives or shrines.

name: Night Stalker
description: Strongest at night and uses fear or stealth.
behavior_rule: Use stealth and fear during night.

name: Day Sentinel
description: Strongest in daylight and uses reveal/cleanse skills.
behavior_rule: Reveal hidden enemies and cleanse allies.

name: River Flow
description: Alternates healing, evasion, and sudden strikes.
behavior_rule: Heal over time and exploit speed.

name: Sea Tide
description: Builds momentum over multiple turns.

name: Mountain Wall
description: Slow, immovable, and very defensive.

name: Forest Snare
description: Controls movement using roots and terrain.

name: Friendly
description: Approaches peacefully and may offer help.

name: Curious
description: Investigates the player before deciding.

name: Neutral
description: Ignores the player unless disturbed.

name: Territorial
description: Warns intruders before attacking.

name: Hostile
description: Attacks on sight due to hunger, rage, or duty.

name: Corrupted
description: Distorted by imbalance and cannot be reasoned with until weakened.

name: Divine
description: Acts according to a sacred trial or higher purpose.

name: Fearful
description: Avoids contact and may flee immediately.

name: Mischievous
description: Tests the player through tricks instead of direct combat.

name: Grieving
description: Responds to memory, offerings, or unresolved tragedy.

name: Bleed
description: Loses HP at the end of each turn from open wounds.

name: Burn
description: Loses HP each turn and suffers reduced physical attack.

name: Poison
description: Loses increasing HP each turn from venom or rot.

name: Sleep
description: Cannot act until damaged or duration ends.

name: Fear
description: May skip actions and receives reduced accuracy.

name: Confusion
description: May target allies or random enemies.

name: Blind
description: Accuracy is greatly reduced.

name: Silence
description: Cannot use magic, chants, or ritual skills.

name: Stun
description: Cannot act for one turn.

name: Root
description: Cannot move or dodge effectively.

name: Slow
description: Speed and turn priority are reduced.

name: Haste
description: Speed and turn priority are increased.

name: Blessed
description: Faith and spirit defense are increased.

name: Shielded
description: Incoming damage is reduced.

name: Regeneration
description: Restores HP at the end of each turn.

name: Purified
description: Recently cleansed from corruption; resists curses.

name: Cursed
description: Luck, faith, and healing received are reduced.

name: Doom
description: A delayed burst of spiritual damage triggers later.

name: Charm
description: May refuse to attack the source of the effect.

name: Petrify
description: Cannot act and takes reduced damage.

name: Spirit Leak
description: Loses mana or spirit energy each turn.

name: Mana Burn
description: Takes damage when spending magic resources.

name: Taunted
description: Forced to target the taunter if possible.

name: Marked
description: Receives increased critical hit chance from attackers.

name: Hidden
description: Cannot be targeted by single-target attacks until revealed.

name: Revealed
description: Hidden and illusion effects are removed.

name: Reflect
description: Returns a portion of incoming damage.

name: Counter Ready
description: Retaliates after being hit by a direct attack.

name: Weakened
description: Attack and magic are reduced.

name: Fortified
description: Defense and spirit defense are increased.

name: Exhausted
description: Cannot use high-cost skills.

name: Frenzy
description: Attack increases but defense decreases.

name: Calmed
description: Frenzy, fear, and confusion are removed.

name: Soaked
description: Fire resistance increases but storm damage received increases.

name: Electrified
description: May be stunned when hit by water or metal skills.

name: Frozen
description: Cannot move; fire damage breaks the effect.

name: Rot
description: Healing received is reduced and poison damage increases.

name: Hopeful
description: Resists fear, doom, and despair effects.

name: Despair
description: Faith is reduced and doom effects become stronger.

name: Ancestral Guard
description: A protective spirit absorbs one harmful effect.

name: Complete Personal Quest
description: Earn trust by resolving the Nilalang's personal conflict.
example_use_case: Kapre joins after illegal loggers are driven away.

name: Restore Shrine
description: Repair or cleanse a damaged sanctuary.
example_use_case: Diwata appears after her flower shrine is restored.

name: Return Sacred Relic
description: Recover a stolen or lost spiritual object.
example_use_case: A river spirit trusts the player after a pearl is returned.

name: Heal Corruption
description: Weaken then cleanse corruption from the Nilalang.
example_use_case: A corrupted guardian becomes recruitable after purification.

name: Give Offering
description: Present food, craft, prayer, or respectful tribute.
example_use_case: Kapre accepts tobacco offered beneath a balete tree.

name: Defeat Honorably
description: Win a fair battle under agreed conditions.
example_use_case: A warrior spirit joins after a duel without items.

name: Solve Ancestral Riddle
description: Answer a riddle rooted in memory or local history.
example_use_case: Tikbalang respects the player after a trail puzzle.

name: Protect Habitat
description: Defend the Nilalang's home from harm.
example_use_case: Forest beings trust the player after replanting trees.

name: Help Related NPC
description: Assist a human connected to the Nilalang's story.
example_use_case: A ghost calms after their descendant is helped.

name: Complete Ritual Condition
description: Perform a ritual at the right time, place, and weather.
example_use_case: A moon spirit appears only during full moon rain.

name: Recover True Name
description: Learn and speak a forgotten name with respect.
example_use_case: An ancestral spirit joins after its name is remembered.

name: Break a Curse
description: Remove a curse binding the Nilalang to hostility.
example_use_case: A cursed human-form Nilalang becomes free.

name: Win Festival Trial
description: Complete a local festival challenge.
example_use_case: A trickster joins after the player wins a masked dance trial.

name: Offer Protection Vow
description: Promise to defend a place, family, or relic.
example_use_case: A guardian joins after a vow is made at a sanctuary.

name: Share a Story
description: Listen to and preserve the Nilalang's tale.
example_use_case: A Kaluluwa becomes peaceful after its story is recorded.

name: Balete Grove
description: Ancient tree groves where the Spirit Realm overlaps with the mortal world.

name: Bamboo Thicket
description: Dense bamboo paths used by spirits, hunters, and tricksters.

name: Rice Terraces
description: Highland farming landscapes shaped by human care and ancestral memory.

name: Mountain Peak
description: Windy peaks where sky and mountain spirits gather.

name: Limestone Cave
description: Dark cave systems holding echoes, bats, relics, and old bones.

name: Riverbank
description: Freshwater edges where healers, fishers, and river spirits meet.

name: Waterfall Sanctuary
description: Hidden waterfall pools considered sacred thresholds.

name: Mangrove Marsh
description: Coastal wetlands rich in roots, mud, birds, and hidden guardians.

name: Coral Reef
description: Bright underwater ecosystems protected by sea beings.

name: Open Sea
description: Deep ocean paths tied to tides, storms, and serpents.

name: Volcano Slope
description: Ashy terrain shaped by fire, minerals, and danger.

name: Old Chapel Ruins
description: Ruined sacred buildings where memory and spirits remain.

name: Spanish-Era Road
description: Old stone roads haunted by travelers, soldiers, and stories.

name: Ancestral House
description: Old family homes filled with heirlooms and restless memories.

name: Graveyard
description: Burial grounds where Kaluluwa and guardian spirits linger.

name: Market Town
description: Busy settlements where tricksters, humans, and small spirits mingle.

name: Fishing Village
description: Coastal communities tied to boats, nets, storms, and offerings.

name: Highland Village
description: Mountain communities close to rice terraces and ancestral guardians.

name: Hidden Lake
description: Quiet inland waters connected to dreams and old promises.

name: Spirit Threshold
description: A liminal zone where realms visibly overlap.

name: Abandoned Watchtower
description: Coastal or hilltop ruins used by sentinels and ghosts.

name: Moonlit Clearing
description: Open forest spaces where moon and dream beings appear.

name: Storm Coast
description: Rocky shorelines battered by monsoon winds and thunder.

name: Sacred Shrine
description: A maintained place of offering, memory, and ritual agreement.

name: Corrupted Wilds
description: Areas where imbalance has twisted plants, animals, and spirits.

name: Clear
description: Bright and stable weather with normal visibility.

name: Cloudy
description: Soft light and covered skies.

name: Rain
description: Steady rain that strengthens river, forest, and water skills.

name: Heavy Rain
description: Strong rainfall that reduces fire effects and increases water hazards.

name: Thunderstorm
description: Lightning and wind increase storm and sky effects.

name: Typhoon
description: Extreme storm conditions with dangerous winds and sea power.

name: Fog
description: Low visibility that strengthens mist, dream, and trickster effects.

name: Mist
description: Gentle haze often found near mountains and waterfalls.

name: Moonlit
description: Night weather with strong lunar visibility.

name: Eclipse
description: Rare celestial event that empowers shadow, moon, and legendary beings.

name: Drought
description: Dry weather that strengthens fire but weakens river effects.

name: Ashfall
description: Volcanic ash reduces visibility and empowers fire/earth beings.

name: Sea Breeze
description: Calm coastal wind that supports sea and sky beings.

name: Heat Haze
description: Distorted hot air that improves illusion and fire effects.

name: Spirit Glow
description: Supernatural weather where unseen energy becomes visible.

name: Day
description: Appears primarily during daylight.

name: Night
description: Appears primarily after sunset.

name: Dawn
description: Appears during early morning transition.

name: Dusk
description: Appears during sunset transition.

name: Midnight
description: Appears around the deepest part of night.

name: Full Moon
description: Appears only or more often during a full moon.

name: New Moon
description: Appears during moonless nights.

name: Rain Only
description: Appears only while raining.

name: Storm Only
description: Appears only during thunderstorms or typhoons.

name: Festival Only
description: Appears during local events, rituals, or story festivals.

name: Any Time
description: Can appear at any time.

name: Story Triggered
description: Appears only when unlocked by story progress.

name: Common
description: Frequently encountered and suitable for early progression.

name: Uncommon
description: Less frequent but not especially rare.

name: Rare
description: Requires specific routes, conditions, or quests.

name: Epic
description: Powerful and usually connected to major side quests.

name: Legendary
description: Unique or nearly unique beings tied to major myths.

name: Mythic
description: Extremely powerful beings with world-level importance.

name: Ancient
description: Story-only or endgame beings not normally recruitable.

name: D
description: Newly bonded rank with limited trust and basic skills.

name: C
description: Stable companion rank with improved reliability.

name: B
description: Trusted rank with stronger stats and new animations.

name: A
description: High-bond rank with advanced skill access.

name: S
description: Elite rank showing visible aura growth.

name: SS
description: Master rank with refined form and strong passive scaling.

name: SSS
description: Legendary bond rank reached only through major trials.

name: Anting-Anting
description: Protective amulets that increase faith, luck, or resistance.

name: Agimat
description: Empowered charms used to enhance specific combat traits.

name: Relic Weapon
description: Sacred or historical weapons used by warrior-type Nilalang.

name: Spirit Mask
description: Masks that alter presence, fear, trickery, or spirit defense.

name: Woven Garb
description: Cloth, sashes, and garments carrying cultural or ritual meaning.

name: Totem
description: Carved or shaped objects that bind memory, land, or animal spirits.

name: Bell
description: Metal sound tools used for warding, calling, or ritual timing.

name: Beadwork
description: Ornamental beads that focus ancestral, sea, or mountain energy.

name: Herbal Bundle
description: Medicinal and ritual plant bundles for healing or cleansing.

name: Shell Charm
description: Sea-born accessories connected to tides, protection, and trade routes.

name: Bone Talisman
description: Somber charms connected to underworld and ancestral effects.

name: Tattoo Mark
description: Symbolic battle markings that function as spiritual equipment.

name: Headdress
description: Ceremonial headgear improving presence, faith, or command.

name: Pipe Relic
description: Smoking or breath-channeling relics used by forest giants and elders.

name: Instrument
description: Drums, flutes, gongs, or strings used to invoke sound skills.

name: Offering
description: Items given to earn trust or perform rituals.

name: Consumable
description: Single-use items for healing, cleansing, or buffs.

name: Crafting Material
description: Resources used to craft equipment or quest items.

name: Quest Item
description: Important objects tied to story or side quests.

name: Food
description: Meals, fruits, fish, sweets, and local dishes used for bonding.

name: Herb
description: Plants used for medicine, poison, ritual, or crafting.

name: Relic
description: Rare artifacts with historical or spiritual importance.

name: Key Item
description: Permanent progression item that unlocks areas or systems.

name: Currency
description: Trade objects such as coins, shells, beads, or spirit tokens.

name: Fishing Item
description: Bait, nets, hooks, and aquatic resources.

name: Mining Item
description: Ore, stones, crystals, and volcanic materials.

name: Bug Item
description: Insects, wings, venom sacs, and small spirit creatures.

name: Memory Item
description: Letters, names, heirlooms, and echo fragments.

name: Purification Item
description: Items used to cleanse corruption or curses.

name: Festival Item
description: Seasonal objects tied to celebrations and local events.

name: Physical
description: Direct body, claw, weapon, or impact techniques.

name: Magic
description: Spiritual, elemental, curse, or ritual damage skills.

name: Healing
description: Skills that restore HP or revive stability.

name: Buff
description: Skills that improve ally stats or protection.

name: Debuff
description: Skills that weaken enemies.

name: Status
description: Skills primarily designed to apply conditions.

name: Summon
description: Skills that call spirits, minions, echoes, or temporary allies.

name: Ultimate
description: Powerful signature techniques with major cooldowns.

name: Passive
description: Always-active abilities or conditional traits.

name: Reaction
description: Skills triggered by enemy actions.

name: Field
description: Skills that alter terrain, weather, or battle zones.

name: Trust
description: Non-combat skills used in bonding, rituals, or dialogue.

name: Self
description: Targets the user only.

name: Single Enemy
description: Targets one enemy.

name: Single Ally
description: Targets one ally.

name: All Enemies
description: Targets every enemy.

name: All Allies
description: Targets every ally.

name: Everyone
description: Targets all combatants.

name: Random Enemy
description: Targets one random enemy.

name: Random Allies
description: Targets random allies.

name: Row Front
description: Targets the front row.

name: Row Back
description: Targets the back row.

name: Area Small
description: Targets a small area.

name: Area Large
description: Targets a large area.

name: Field
description: Targets the battlefield itself.

name: Weather
description: Targets or changes weather state.

name: Dead Ally
description: Targets a defeated ally.

name: Physical
description: Damage based mainly on attack and defense.

name: Spiritual
description: Damage based on magic, faith, and spirit defense.

name: True
description: Damage that ignores most defenses.

name: Fire
description: Heat, flame, ash, and volcanic damage.

name: Water
description: Freshwater, sea, rain, and pressure damage.

name: Storm
description: Lightning, thunder, wind, and typhoon damage.

name: Earth
description: Stone, soil, root, and mineral damage.

name: Nature
description: Vine, thorn, leaf, pollen, and wildlife damage.

name: Shadow
description: Night, fear, curse, and darkness damage.

name: Sacred
description: Blessing, purification, and sanctuary damage.

name: Poison
description: Venom, rot, toxin, and bitter herb damage.

name: Blood
description: Life-force, wound, sacrifice, and hunger damage.

name: Sound
description: Voice, gong, bell, echo, and song damage.

name: Dream
description: Sleep, nightmare, vision, and illusion damage.

name: Ancestral
description: Memory, lineage, vow, and old-name damage.
